summary: Completed testing of SoulNutri Admin Panel after Object Storage migration. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: 206 dishes displayed with thumbnails, search working, slugs in clean hyphen format.

issues: Stats show 189/1632 from AI index endpoint, not 206 from dishes-full - this is expected per context notes

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/admin/dishes-full correctly returns 206 dishes with ok:true
All 206 dishes have image_count > 0 (no dishes with missing images)
All slugs are in clean hyphen format (no underscores)
Specific image query (?img=filename) works correctly (~155KB for arrozbranco026.jpeg)
Frontend Admin.js loadDishes() correctly fetches and displays all 206 dishes
Search functionality working (Arroz returns 8 dishes with correct image counts)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Object Storage migration testing complete. 99 dishes in cloud storage, 107 on local disk - all serving correctly via unified endpoint. dish_storage collection is source of truth for images. Stats bar (189/1632) comes from /api/ai/status (AI index), not dishes-full endpoint - this is expected.

passed_tests: test_slugs_are_clean_format - All slugs use hyphens, no underscores
test_dishes_have_first_image - All dishes with images have first_image set
test_abobora_ao_curry_image_cloud - Cloud storage image returns valid (128014 bytes)
test_frango_ao_creme_de_limao_image - Local fallback image returns valid (42083 bytes)
test_dish_structure_complete - All dishes have required fields

frontend_verification.search_functionality: Search for 'Arroz' returns 8 dishes with correct image counts
frontend_verification.slug_format: All visible slugs in clean hyphen format (arroz-branco, arroz-7-graos, etc.)
frontend_verification.image_counts_displayed: Photo counts visible on cards (40, 27, 2, 10, 28, 9 for arroz dishes)
